assets.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: TikTok Shop size comparison chart
Primary request: Create a clean, accurate size comparison display showing four canvas sizes for a pet portrait product line.
Scene/backdrop: bright white or very light neutral wall, identical consistent camera angle and lighting for all four canvases — same eye-level straight-on perspective with no distortion or tilt.
Subject: four rectangular stretched canvases arranged in a horizontal row in ascending size order, each showing a different pet portrait (a golden retriever, a tabby cat, a beagle, and a mixed-breed dog). Canvases are: 8×12 in (smallest, leftmost), 12×18 in, 16×24 in, 24×36 in (largest, rightmost). Each canvas must have its size label in clean sans-serif text directly below it.
A ceramic mug on a small shelf near the 8×12 canvas provides a real-world scale anchor.
Composition: square 1:1, all four canvases share the same wall, same height baseline, consistent spacing between them, size labels clearly legible.
Style: realistic interior product photography, bright even lighting across all canvases, professional neutral aesthetic, premium quality.
Text policy: size labels only — '8×12 in', '12×18 in', '16×24 in', '24×36 in' — in clean readable text beneath each canvas; no other overlays, no watermarks.
Avoid: watermarks, perspective distortion, mismatched angles between canvases, dramatically different lighting on different canvases, cluttered backgrounds
Avoid: watermarks, QR codes, platform UI, distorted hands, tiny unreadable text, misleading scale, messy backgrounds, official sports logos, team crests, celebrity or athlete likenesses, copyrighted characters
